s: Open-source Stalker IPTV client for Android
d:
KnightStalker is a free and open-source Stalker IPTV client for Android.

Features:
* Live TV with EPG (Electronic Program Guide)
* Video on Demand (VOD) browsing and playback
* Multiple portal support with auto-probing URL resolution
* Channel favorites and watch history with resume playback
* Search across channels and movies
* Picture-in-Picture support
* Portrait and landscape orientation support
* Android TV compatible (leanback launcher)
* Media download support
* Material Design 3 interface with dark theme

KnightStalker connects to Stalker middleware portals to stream IPTV content. You need a valid portal URL and MAC address from your IPTV provider to use this app.

This app does not include any tracking, analytics, or advertisements.
